query.label: Score history for a candidate (inline demo data)
query.sql: SELECT '{"candidate":{"id":"cand_nathan_k","name":"Nathan K.","role":"AI Engineer"},"verdict":"rejected","reject_threshold":70,"subnote":"First scored Apr 19 · re-scored Apr 28 after distillation pass.","history":[{"version":"v1","score":82,"note":"Initial scoring — default weights"},{"version":"v2","score":78,"note":"Hackathons de-emphasized after Sergey feedback"},{"version":"v3","score":71,"note":"Counter-pattern added: drive-by OSS PRs don''t count"},{"version":"v4","score":65,"note":"hard_things_done weight raised to 0.27 (compounded)"}],"takeaway":"Nathan would have passed the v1 rubric (82 / threshold 70). After 3 interviewer feedback events compounded into the skill, the same evidence now scores 65 — below threshold. The system learned what we kept missing."}' AS payload
